title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
